# Firefly Forest Trail

Firefly Forest Trail is an iPhone-only offline SpriteKit game. The player controls a lantern in a glowing forest, switches between Gold, Green, and Blue light, and captures matching fireflies before the timer expires.

## Release Identity

- App Name: Firefly Forest Trail
- PRODUCT_NAME: FireflyForestTrail
- Bundle ID: com.rosewood.fireflyforesttrail
- Device Support: iPhone only
- Version: 1.0
- Team ID: 7ZR52UNP43
